citations.quote: complete the RA Application Pack and email it to Reslife@napier.ac.uk by 5pm 12 April 2026. You can also find the RA Application Pack attached to this email for easy access.

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email from Callum Abbot (Napier) to all residents, with an embedded .docx attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB).
The email invites RA applications for 2026/27, offering a 55% rent reduction, and directs applicants to complete the attached pack and email it by 5pm 12 April 2026.
The embedded .docx attachment was not extracted because the harness lacks pdfdetach or Tika. The extracted text only confirms its presence.
No tool for detaching embedded files from PDFs is available in the current harness. A follow-up task is needed once such a tool is configured.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Extraction Status for NAP-SRC-0046

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0046 (PDF email)
**Embedded attachment:** 2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx (63 KB)

**Status:** Not extracted. The harness does not have pdfdetach or Apache Tika configured. The extracted text confirms the attachment exists but cannot retrieve its content.

**Next step:** Configure a tool (e.g., pdfdetach, Tika) to detach the embedded .docx, then re-run extraction to obtain the full content of the RA Application Pack.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction status for NAP-SRC-0046 embedded .docx

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use pdfdetach or Apache Tika to detach the embedded file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from source NAP-SRC-0046 (PDF). Extract the .docx content as plain text and store it as a new source or artifact. If the tool is not available, request human setup.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx from NAP-SRC-0046 using pdfdetach or Tika

risk_flags.description: Missing extraction of the embedded .docx may cause loss of relevant evidence (e.g., application terms, rent reduction conditions).

summary: Source NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email with an embedded .docx attachment (2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx). The extracted text confirms the attachment but does not extract its content. The task requires a tool like pdfdetach or Apache Tika to detach the embedded .docx. No such tool is available in the current harness. A follow-up task is proposed to perform the extraction once the tool is configured.

uncertainties.description: The content of the embedded .docx attachment (2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx) is unknown because it was not extracted.
It is uncertain whether the .docx contains terms, conditions, or application questions relevant to the accommodation arrears matter.
